name: Email Writer
description: Generate on-brand marketing and lifecycle emails that convert.

gettingStarted.title: What is Email Writer?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Describe the email you want to create, including purpose, target audience, and key messages. The agent will generate engaging email content optimized for your goals.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Email Writer creates compelling, on-brand email content for marketing campaigns, customer lifecycle communications, and promotional messages that drive engagement and conversions.

inputs.label: Email Description
inputs.description: Describe the email you want to create
inputs.placeholder: Tell us about the email you want to write (purpose, audience, key messages)...

inputs.label: Ground with context
inputs.description: Optionally select artifacts or knowledge to provide additional context

inputs.label: Add Reference Materials
inputs.description: Upload any brand guidelines or reference materials

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert email writer. Create a high-quality, engaging email based on the provided prompt.
You are an expert email writer. Create a high-quality, engaging email based on the provided prompt.
